candidate_definition_hints.text: A mitigation for CVE-2021-44228 (log4shell) that works by patching the vulnerability at runtime. (Works with any vulnerable java software, tested with java 6 and newer)
A Java Agent based mitigation for Log4j2 JNDI exploits.
